summary: 27,797 results all discarded with 0 keepers and the X101+ exit pipeline is starved (R2 self-identified gap) — proposals weight EXIT archetypes (6) and propose entries with naturally symmetric or contrarian setups using ONLY supported fields, avoiding the asymmetric TP/SL trap from R1+R2.

proposals.notes: Asian-session retail panic shorts in low-liquidity perps trigger squeezes within minutes — long fades the panic.
proposals.rationale: No existing entry combines session=Asian × global_short_ratio_extreme × liquidity_bucket=low; this 3-way intersection is uncovered.

proposals.notes: Monday OI collapse with deep negative premium signals continuation of weekend liquidation — shorts ride the unwind.
proposals.rationale: Weekday-gated OI-collapse continuation not in 85 OI_Price entries; adds calendar dimension to existing OI archetypes.

proposals.notes: Smart money capitulated (low ratio) + funding deeply negative + cash discount — contrarian long at maximum bearish positioning.
proposals.rationale: Combines three orthogonal contrarian signals; existing top_trader archetypes don't gate on funding AND premium simultaneously.

proposals.notes: US-open frenzy with already-extended daily move and aggressive taker buying — fade the late longs piling in at the high.
proposals.rationale: hour_utc dimension absent from existing 267 entries; combines intraday-timing gate with exhaustion signal.

proposals.notes: New listing under 30 days with extreme OI pump and positive perp premium — crowded longs in immature liquidity get faded.
proposals.rationale: listing_age_days as gate is absent from existing entry archetypes; introduces asset-maturity dimension.

proposals.notes: Mid-cap with positive perp premium but negative basis — perp/spot divergence playable arb-style long with natural exit when basis normalizes.
proposals.rationale: Cross-instrument premium↔basis divergence pair not represented; existing arb archetypes use only one of the two signals.

proposals.notes: Triple-extreme stack of crowd sentiment + funding + premium — high-conviction short fade against maximally crowded longs.
proposals.rationale: Stacking 3 supported flag tokens for overcrowding is novel; existing archetypes use 1-2 of these flags at a time.

proposals.notes: European-session OI ratio burst in low-liquidity pairs — early followers pile in ahead of US confirmation, riding the front-running flow.
proposals.rationale: session=European × oi_ratio_pct combination not present in 85 OI_Price entries; calendar+liquidity gate is novel.

proposals.notes: Just-before-US-open hour with top-decile OI and aggressive taker buy — front-running the US session activity boost.
proposals.rationale: hour_utc=13 (pre-US-open) gate combined with OI+taker is uncovered; existing entries don't slice by 1-hour buckets.

proposals.notes: Trail-style exit that tightens immediately when funding rate flips against the held position direction — funding-aware exit family.
proposals.rationale: No existing exit kernel uses funding-rate flip as a gate; bridges trail + funding signal into a new hybrid exit family — fills X101+ gap.

proposals.notes: Exit when premium_bps reverts to neutral (crosses 0) — locks in the arb-driven move and avoids holding into stale premium.
proposals.rationale: Premium-mean-revert exit logic absent from 150 exit archetypes; uses supported premium_bps field as gate.

proposals.notes: Exit when top-trader position ratio flips against the held position — smart money has capitulated or loaded, signal exhausted.
proposals.rationale: Smart-money sentiment flip as exit gate is novel; existing 5 exit kernels (fixed/time_only/breakeven/trail/multi_tp) use price/time only.

proposals.notes: Exit when basis_rate normalizes within ±5 bps of zero — basis-driven trade has played its hand.
proposals.rationale: Basis-rate normalization as exit trigger is uncovered in 150 exits; uses supported basis_rate field.

proposals.notes: For long positions: exit when post-entry OI drops 5% or more — leveraged longs are deleveraging, removing fuel for further upside.
proposals.rationale: OI-collapse-as-exit-gate is distinct from price/time-based exits; pairs with any kernel as a hybrid family.

proposals.notes: Exit when post-entry volume drops below p25 of recent distribution — signal exhausted, no follow-through, scratch the trade.
proposals.rationale: Volume-decay-as-exit-gate uncovered; the 5 existing exit kernels are price+time only and don't read volume.

proposals.notes: Block all entries when funding magnitude AND premium are both in extreme states — avoid entering at peak crowd-positioning.
proposals.rationale: Multi-flag overheated-state filter not present in 126 filter archetypes; uses supported flag tokens.

proposals.notes: Require mid+ marketcap or high liquidity or 10M+ daily quote volume — exclude manipulation-prone microcaps.
proposals.rationale: Quality-gate combining 3 supported categorical/numeric fields not present in current filter set.

proposals.notes: Reduce position size to 50% when funding magnitude is extreme — tail risk of funding-driven liquidation cascade is materially higher.
proposals.rationale: Adaptive size scaling on funding magnitude is uncovered in 42 risk archetypes; introduces volatility-aware sizing.

proposals.notes: When OI_Price and pricechange channels fire same-direction within 120s and taker-buy and OI both confirm — high-confidence amplified entry.
proposals.rationale: Cross-channel consensus amplification gated by supported micro-signals (taker+OI) not present in 67 cross_channel archetypes.

proposals.notes: Reserved6 (extreme move) followed by pricechange within 180s with premium spike — late longs piling in after the climax, fade short.
proposals.rationale: Sequential ordered-channel pattern (Reserved6→pricechange) gated by move+premium; existing cross_channel archetypes are within-window co-occurrence, not sequenced.
